description_long: This is a double bed with a light wood nightstand attached to one side, featuring three drawers. The bed is made up with a light blue comforter that is slightly rumpled, and two white pillows are visible at the head. The mattress is white with a subtle blue accent stripe along the edge. The nightstand is constructed from a light-colored wood and has a simple, boxy design. The bed frame itself is low and appears to be a platform style, with no visible legs or under-bed clearance. The overall appearance is modern and functional, suitable for a contemporary urban bedroom.
description: A modern double bed with a light blue comforter, white pillows, and an attached light wood nightstand with drawers.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bed with a light blue comforter, two white pillows, and a three-drawer wooden nightstand on the left.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the two pillows, the comforter draped over the bed, and the nightstand partially visible behind the pillows.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the nightstand on the right, the comforter pulled up, and the mattress edge visible.
description_view_3: Foot view showing the end of the bed, the comforter, and the nightstand fully visible at the head.
